releases.release: Fix pdsc name to follow Pack Installer rules in Keil uVision 5.39.0.0.
Fix pack name to follow Pack Installer rules in Keil uVision 5.39.0.0.
Add new MCU support. SPL MDR32FxQI libraries have been updated to version 1.3.0.
Added initial MDR1986VE94GI support. SPL MDR32FxQI libraries have been updated to version 1.2.0.

The addition of the CMSIS_device_header preprocessor directive with the name of the CMSIS header file of the selected microcontroller in the RTE_Components.h file is enabled. FLM files updated. The SPL MDR32FxQI libraries have been updated to version 1.1.0.

taxonomy.description: Examples for work with microcontroller peripherals

condition.description: Milandr Device from Cortex-M3 DSP Series

component.description: This example describes how to use the ADC1 to transfer continuously converted data from ADC1 to memory
This example describes how to use the ADC1 and DMA to transfer continuously converted data from ADC1 to memory
This example shows how to use DMA in ping-pong mode
This example shows how to use DMA in ping-pong mode
This example describes how to use the ADC analog watchdog to guard continuously an ADC channel
This example describes how to use the ADC analog watchdog to guard continuously an ADC channel
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the ARINC
This example shows how to use BKP module functions
This example shows how to use BKP module functions
This example shows how to use MCU SLEEP mode
This example shows how to use BKP module low-power functions
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the CAN in loopback mode
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the CAN in loopback mode
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the CAN in loopback mode
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the CAN in loopback mode
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the CAN in loopback mode
This example provides a description of how to set a communication with the CAN in loopback mode
This example shows how to use COMP module functions
This example describes how to use DAC with DMA to generate sine waves on DAC channel output
This example describes how to use DAC with DMA to generate sine waves on DAC channel output
This example shows how to use DMA
This example shows how to use DMA

This example provides a description of how to use four DMA channels to transfer a data buffer from memory to SPI_SLAVE(SSP2) through SPI_MASTER(SSP1) and a second data buffer from memory to SPI_MASTER through SPI_SLAVE in full-duplex mode

This example provides a description of how to use four DMA channels to transfer a data buffer from memory to SPI_SLAVE(SSP2) through SPI_MASTER(SSP1) and a second data buffer from memory to SPI_MASTER through SPI_SLAVE in full-duplex mode
This example provides a description of how to use DMA with TIM1 Capture request to transfer Data from TIM1 Capture Compare Register2 to memory
This example provides a description of how to use DMA with TIM1 Capture request to transfer Data from TIM1 Capture Compare Register2 to memory
This example provides a basic communication between UART1 and UART2 using DMA capability
This example provides a basic communication between UART1 and UART2 using DMA capability
This example shows how to use EXT_BUS module functions
This example shows how to use EXT_BUS module functions
This example shows how to use EXT_BUS module functions
This example shows how to use EXT_BUS module functions
This example shows how to use EEPROM
This example shows how to use EEPROM
This example shows how to use EEPROM
This example shows how to use EEPROM
This example shows how to use EEPROM
This example shows how to use EEPROM
This example shows how to use Ethernet for ICMP and TELNET
This example shows how to use I2C
This example shows how to use I2C
This example shows how to use I2C
This example shows how to use IWDG module functions
This example shows how to use IWDG module functions
This example provides a description of how to use MIL STD 1553 in Bus Controller mode
This example provides a description of how to use MIL STD 1553 in Terminal Device mode
This example is intended to show the functionality of microcontroller MDR32F1QI in TERMINAL mode of the standart GOST R 52070-2003
This example shows how to use input/output ports
This example shows how to use input/output ports
This example shows how to use input/output ports
This example shows how to use RST_CLK module functions to choose particular CPU_CLK frequency
This example shows how to use RST_CLK module functions to choose particular CPU_CLK frequency
This example provides a description of how to set a communication between SPI1 and SPI2 in full-duplex mode and performs a transfer from Master to Slave
This example provides a description of how to set a communication between SPI1 and SPI2 in full-duplex mode and performs a transfer from Master to Slave
This example shows how to configure the TIM4 peripheral to generate 5 PWM signals with 3 different duty cycles
This example shows how to configure the TIM4 peripheral to generate 5 PWM signals with 3 different duty cycles
This example shows how to use UART
This example shows how to use UART
This example shows how to use UART
This example shows how to use UART
This example shows how to redirect standard I/O (STDIO) to UART using the MDR32FxQI_utils module
This example shows how to redirect standard I/O (STDIO) to UART using the MDR32FxQI_utils module
This example shows how to use UART
This example shows how to use UART
This example shows how to use USB CDC (Communication Device Class) device as Virtual COM port implementing "echo" mode
This example shows how to use USB CDC (Communication Device Class) device as Virtual COM port implementing "echo" mode
This example shows how to use WWDG module functions
This example shows how to use WWDG module functions
This example shows how to use WWDG module functions
